name: cairn
description: Trust + reputation auto-rating for sources, MCP servers, and tools. Rates every WebFetch/WebSearch/MCP/Bash-net call in the background; claude-cli rater (default) bills your claude.ai subscription at ~$0.02-0.07/rating, set CAIRN_RATER_BACKEND=api with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for ~$0.0003/rating. See https://cairnscore.ai/privacy.

use_api_backend.title: Use Anthropic API for the rater?
use_api_backend.description: Off (default): use your claude.ai subscription via the `claude` CLI — no API key needed, ~$0.02-0.07/rating, ~20s latency. On: use your Anthropic API key — ~$0.0003/rating (~100x cheaper), ~2s latency. Requires the API key field below.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key (only used if the toggle above is on)
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com. Required only if the api-backend toggle is on; ignored otherwise. Stored in the system keychain (sensitive).

rating_cadence.title: Rating cadence
rating_cadence.description: Rate 1 in every N tool calls (per-session counter). 1 = rate every call (full coverage). 4 = rate every 4th call (25% coverage, ~4x cheaper). Higher values save more on rater cost but provide less feedback to the cairn corpus. Counter resets each Claude Code session.
